## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
_RE_KINDS_LOO = {
    "mechanism",
    "gain_factors",
    "level_factors",
    "did",
    "dose_response",
    "lcsm",
    "growth",
}
if _has("loo.txt"):
    print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
    if config.get("kind") in _RE_KINDS_LOO:
        print(
            "\n_Note:_ this family carries a per-child random intercept, so its "
            "PSIS-LOO is **conditional** (within-child, one-row-out) — elpd predicts a "
            "held-out child × phase/period row given that child's own fitted intercept, "
            "not a new child. It is comparable only against models with the same "
            "grouping on the same rows (as the nested interaction/dose comparators are)."
        )
else:
    print("_No LOO summary for this model (e.g. the mediation family does not compute one)._")
```
